violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item * was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Buns stored on the floor in the back storage area next to the garage door. Food should be stored minimum 6" up off the floor.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil * was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Scoops stored in the sugar/salt/brown sugar bins not stored with the handles up and out of the food.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
